deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42-62K. Comps pulled, CMA template being built.
deals.next: Feed data to Sirhc, build first analysis sheet, lock template

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Using as basis for property analysis tool development.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage development opportunity. Listing canceled. Signs picked up. No path forward with sellers or Isaac development concept. Walking away.

logs.m: Listing canceled - walking away from this deal. Signs picked up from property last week.
Isaac Linares discussed developing into mobile homes (half units for displaced veterans, half for profit). Sisters enthusiastic about development angle.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs. Plan to relist when timing is right. Underwater approximately $93-143K. Chandler was laid off - hardship documented.
deals.next: Closed - maintain relationship for future relist

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back into property. Plan: make updates and repairs needed, relist when timing is right.
Call completed 11am. Matt and Chandler leaning toward short sale. Chandler was laid off. Relationship intact - ended on good terms.

deals.title: 301 W Saxet
deals.notes: Wholesale deal at $85K. Two structures - one livable home, one 2BR teardown. FHA 203(k) plan: demo teardown, rehab main home. Zach S evaluating financing. Mike and Alice Howell connected with Isaac.
deals.next: Follow up with Zach on 203(k) feasibility. Confirm deal movement after Isaac + Mike phone call.

logs.m: Isaac brought wholesale deal. Property has two structures. FHA 203(k) is financing angle. Zach S sent property info. Mike and Isaac scheduled phone call today.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3 bed/2 bath, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff $257K (May 2026 estimate). Sellers need minimum $285-290K to walk with meaningful proceeds. CMA shows $295K recommended list price. Going through divorce, need to finish renovation and sell.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Confirm acreage. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property 10am. CMA pulled - thin market, 3 comps in 10 miles. Built listing presentation with net sheet. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 17, 2026.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1,886 sqft. Listed May 14 at $259,900. Second-look buyers are hottest lead - their favorite property. Multiple showings. Relocating to NC in June - high urgency. Potential hairline foundation crack flagged.
deals.next: Confirm showing time for May 30. Follow up with second-look buyers agent. Monitor for backup offer.

logs.m: Second-look buyers back - their favorite property. They love floorplan and maintenance. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled showing to May 30.
MLS live today. Sign and lockbox dropped. Canvassed neighborhood - neighbors friendly and interested. First showing feedback received.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale - cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded April 27, 2026. Confirmed complete May 9. Lien blocker resolved. All parties satisfied.

logs.m: Transaction officially confirmed closed and funded. Joy gift delivery and thank you basket still pending.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at mobile notary. Release delivered to Chicago Title. Title cleared.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank REO. Cleanup ongoing via Matt Toney/San Antonio Remodelers. Floor demo complete, drywall cut, new drywall on site. Police reports stalled. Utilities unconfirmed. Listing agreement still needed.
deals.next: Call utility companies. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler + Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Visited property yesterday - drywall crew actively patching remaining holes. Sent photos to Kelly. Need update email to Kelly, Jerry, and Ray with progress.
Cleanup still active. Floor demo complete. Drywall cut. New drywall on site ready to go up. Utilities confirmed.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Contract executed with Espinoza buyers at $113,000. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier. Escrow open with Chicago Title / Alyssa Castillo.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain.

logs.m: New buyers: Espinoza family. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD not yet received. Another agent called with backup buyers.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Rental listing arrangement for Grace Gardens Lennar home. Rental agreement never executed. Arrangement concluded - payment received by Chris. Ended on good terms. Skyslope listing cleared out.

logs.m: Release sent to Jimbo. Payment received. Relationship intact - closed out clean.
Jimbo backed out of rental listing arrangement. Chris sent $500 to cover time and money invested.

deals.title: Milagros Stringer - New Construction
deals.notes: New construction buyer. Budget $50K down, target payment $1,000/month (P+I). Builder rate buydowns are the angle. MI Homes option from Frank still in play. Not locked to any builder. Buyer rep signed May 7.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Follow up on MI Homes option. Schedule builder visits.

logs.m: Follow up with Milagros on timeline and interest level. Ask Brandon what is going on. MI Homes option from Frank still in play.
Buyer rep signed. Rental setup docs also in folder. Buyer not locked to Grace Gardens or any builder.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden community/Little Red House. Grief to healing to plants story. Content collaboration opportunity (needs permission). Real estate potential through trust-based relationship.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story for content.

logs.m: Follow up needed - deepen relationship, ask permission for story.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Investor lead met in person. Buy box unknown. Area of interest likely Schertz based on context. Full Sage intake still needed.
leads.next: Full intake call - understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy.

logs.m: Met in person - investor interested in Schertz area. No further details on file yet.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St. Plans to sell soon but already working with realtor. Property 90% complete, having trouble finishing. Open to selling as-is. Pre-market opportunity.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing work progress. Offer to promote listing to buyer network.

logs.m: Met at garden event May 9, 2026. Already working with realtor - not currently available to list. Stay in her orbit.

leads.title: Miss Pat's Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Son now owns house directly behind Miss Pat (neighbor). Previous owner recently passed away - avid gardener. Son has not been contacted yet. Probate/inherited property angle. Garden connection is natural entry point.
leads.next: Get son's name and contact from Miss Pat. Reach out - introduce as neighbor and gardener first.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor directly behind her may have passed away. Son now owns house. Previous owner was avid gardener.

leads.title: Bryce - VA Buyer Lead
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Dumpster contractor. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info on next site visit. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military. VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, looking to buy.

leads.title: Jerome - Buyer Fixer Property
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner - downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property that needs work - unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and property they want.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome May 11. Details pending on buyer and fixer property situation.

leads.title: Kurt - 9815 Conbes Neighbor
leads.detail: Neighbor around the corner from 9815 Conbes. Watching nearby listing under contract at $275,000. Wants intel on offers received. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes details. Report back to Kurt.

logs.m: Pull CMA and get everything together. Determine if Kurt is potential seller, buyer, or just curious neighbor.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - helped Brandon get started in real estate. Two opportunities: (1) Green Bliss rental listing for uncle (Jimbo), (2) Mother (Milagros Stringer) new construction buyer. Builder relationships and PM coordination.
leads.next: Maintain relationship. Follow up on mother's new construction purchase timeline.

logs.m: Rental arrangement with Jimbo backed out. Builder outreach continuing for Milagros.
Met in person. Green Bliss rental opportunity and mother new construction buyer opportunity identified.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Moran's mom. New construction buyer. Budget $50K down, target payment $1,000/month P+I. Not locked into any builder. Builder rate buydowns strategy. Buyer rep signed May 7.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Schedule builder visits. Multiple builder options.

logs.m: Buyer rep sent. MI Homes option from Frank in play. Working multiple builder options for payment scenarios.

priorities.title: Mill Path Closing
priorities.sub: 10023 Mill Path - Second-look buyers hottest lead
priorities.notes: Multiple showings completed. Second-look buyers came back - property is their favorite. Pre-inspection report offered. Hottest lead for closing.

followUps.text: Follow up with second-look buyers agent after showing

priorities.notes: Drywall crew actively patching remaining holes. Cleanup moving forward. Utilities and police reports still pending. Listing agreement still needed for bank.
